title: Fix inverted name display and add present/leaving time to Attendance System

requirements.text: Fix the attendance system so that registered person names are displayed in the correct (non-inverted) order in the attendance list UI. Names should appear exactly as they were registered, not reversed or flipped.

quotes: attandance system name showing inverted show currectly

acceptanceCriteria: Names in the attendance records list are displayed in the same order they were registered (e.g., 'Aswin Nair' shows as 'Aswin Nair', not 'Nair Aswin')
All existing attendance records show names correctly without any inversion
Newly registered faces display names correctly in all attendance views

requirements.text: Add 'Present Time' and 'Leaving Time' fields to the attendance system. When a person is marked as present (face recognized), record the timestamp as their present time. When they are marked as leaving (or the session ends / a leave event is triggered), record the timestamp as their leaving time. Both times should be displayed in the attendance records list.

quotes: it present and leaving time also add

acceptanceCriteria: The backend attendance record type includes both a presentTime and a leavingTime field (as timestamps or nullable text)
When a face is recognized and attendance is marked, the presentTime is recorded and stored
There is a UI action (e.g., a 'Mark Leaving' button per record or a leave detection trigger) to record the leavingTime for a recognized person
The attendance records list displays both 'Present Time' and 'Leaving Time' columns for each record
If a person has not yet been marked as leaving, the leaving time column shows a placeholder such as 'Still Present' or '-'
Times are displayed in a human-readable format (e.g., HH:MM:SS or locale string)

constraints: Do not modify any files under frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.ts, frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts, frontend/src/main.tsx, or frontend/src/components/ui
All backend logic must remain in the single actor in backend/main.mo
nonGoals: Redesigning the overall attendance UI layout or theme
Adding new biometric recognition methods beyond existing face-api.js integration
Implementing shift scheduling or overtime calculations
Email or push notification for attendance events
